dataList.name: Dignity of the B.E.
dataList.desc: Turn End: Deal 5 SP damage to all enemies

dataList.name: Tango Marinade
dataList.desc: If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's, Clash Power +(Speed / 3)

dataList.name: I'll Just Have to Force-feed You!
dataList.desc: Turn End: Inflict 1 [DeliciousSauce] on all enemies next turn

dataList.name: Let's All Cook Together!
dataList.desc: Turn End: Heal 10 SP for all allies and enemies participating in this battle (excluding this unit)

dataList.name: It was All... for the Kids.
dataList.desc: On Attack Hit: Deal -1% damage for every 1% missing HP on target
